Now encrypted "vetri" maps to "alice". So v->a, e->l, t->i, r->c, i->e. Wait i already maps to e, consistent. Good. So t->i, r->c, i->e. So far mapping: m->t, o->h, i->e, v->a, e->l, t->i, r->c.

Now encrypted "kneendp" maps to "follows". Let's map letters: k->f, n->o, e->l? Wait e already maps to l, but in "follows", the second letter is o, third is l, fourth is l, fifth is o, sixth is w, seventh is s. Let's align length: "kneendp" length 7, "follows" length 7. So mapping each position:
k -> f
n -> o
e -> l
e -> l (again)
n -> o
d -> w
p -> s
Now check mapping: e->l matches earlier e->l, good. n->o matches earlier n? Not yet defined. d->w, p->s. So we have n->o, d->w, p->s.

Now encrypted "xij" maps to "key". x->k, i->e, j->y. i already maps to e, consistent. So x->k, j->y.

Now encrypted "dftmip" maps to "writes". Let's align: d f t m i p length 6, writes length 6. Mapping:
d -> w
f -> r
t -> i
m -> t
i -> e
p -> s
Now check: d previously mapped to w, consistent. f->r, t->i matches earlier t->i, i->e matches, p->s matches earlier p->s. Good.

Now encrypted "dtpi" maps to "wise". d->w, t->i, p->s, i->e. That gives "w i s e" = "wise". Indeed d->w, t->i, p->s, i->e gives "w i s e". Works.

Now encrypted "stffnf" maps to "mirror". Let's align: s t f f n f length 6, mirror length 6. Mapping:
s -> m
t -> i
f -> r
f -> r
n -> o
f -> r
Now check: t->i matches, f->r matches, n->o matches earlier n->o, good. So s->m.

Now encrypted "pmfvywi" maps to "strange". Let's align: p m f v y w i length 7, strange length 7. Mapping:
p -> s
m -> t
f -> r
v -> a
y -> n
w -> g
i -> e
Now check: p->s matches earlier p->s, m->t matches earlier m->t, f->r matches, v->a matches, y->n (new), w->g (new), i->e matches. Good.

Now encrypted "snlpi" maps to "mouse". s n l p i -> m o u s e. Mapping:
s -> m (consistent)
n -> o (consistent)
l -> u
p -> s (consistent)
i -> e (consistent)
Now l->u is new.

Now encrypted "fivbp" maps to "reads". f i v b p -> r e a d s. Mapping:
f -> r (consistent)
i -> e (consistent)
v -> a (consistent)
b -> d
p -> s (consistent)
Now b->d is new.

o -> h
i -> e
v -> a
e -> l
t -> i
r -> c
k -> f
n -> o
d -> w
p -> s
x -> k
j -> y
f -> r
m (again) -> t
i -> e
p -> s
d -> w
t -> i
i -> e
Now also:
s -> m
l -> u
b -> d
y -> n
g -> ? Actually w->g, so w maps to g.
